quote: Start the day with love, spend the day with love, fill the day with love and end the day with love. – Sathya Sai Baba
fact: Arnold Schonberg suffered from triskaidecaphobia, the fear of the number 13.  He died at 13 minutes from midnight on Friday the 13th.
joke: *Reversing the car* "Ah, this takes me back"
